query.label: Distilled top signals (inline demo data)
query.sql: SELECT '{"candidate":{"id":"cand_nathan_k","name":"Nathan K.","role":"AI Engineer"},"composite_score":65,"rounds_count":3,"rubric_version":"v4","last_updated":"Apr 28","strengths":[{"trait":"hackathons","rating":9,"evidence":["Top 3 at ETHGlobal SF ''24 — agent orchestration prototype","Won EIP-7702 hack at Devcon Bangkok"],"surfaced_by":"TraitExtractor","source":"resume + GitHub scan"},{"trait":"open_source_contributions","rating":7.5,"evidence":["12 PRs merged across viem, hardhat, foundry — all docs/typo fixes","No substantive commits to a project >1k stars"],"surfaced_by":"TraitExtractor","source":"GitHub scan"}],"concerns":[{"trait":"hard_things_done","rating":4.5,"evidence":["Hesitated on ''tell me about a system you scaled past 10k RPS'' — pivoted to a hackathon project","No evidence of on-call ownership or production incident handling"],"surfaced_by":"TranscriptAnalyzer","source":"Round 2 interview · Sergey"},{"trait":"company_signals","rating":5,"evidence":["Two stints under 10 months at early-stage startups","No reference able to vouch for shipped systems past beta"],"surfaced_by":"Distillation","source":"reference + LinkedIn"}]}' AS payload
